content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-indian-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Romantic Ooty Honeymoon Packages from ATW Travels”][vc_column_text]

A honeymoon is the best time to relax and provide some much-wanted relief from the stress of wedding preparation. If you are looking to make your honeymoon memorable, trust ATW Travels. We offer all-inclusive honeymoon packages so that you can chill out and make the most of your vacation.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is Ooty the Most Popular Honeymoon Destination?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Who wouldn’t love waking up to the lovely fragrance of the monsoon showers and enjoying flavored tea? Gift your partner an incredible choice of Ooty honeymoon packages, carefully crafted to match your budget and preferences. We’ll help you immerse in the beauty of nature with itineraries that include the best of everything, including accommodation, adventure activities, local attractions, and food.

There is no better way to celebrate love than experiencing pure bliss at a beautiful honeymoon location like Ooty. Ooty offers a perfect chance to those looking to escape from the hustle and bustle of city life. This peaceful hill station is at an elevation of 2200 meters above sea level and has retained its charm and serenity.

You can ride on the Nilgiri Mountain Railway, a vintage steam train that winds through steep curves, bridges, tunnels, waterfalls, and tea estates to experience Ooty in its natural beauty. Or, go boating on the Pykara Lake. With its beautiful scenery and fantastic local attractions, it is no wonder that Ooty is referred to as the ‘Queen of the Hills’ in local culture.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19434″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips To Ensure a Stress-free Ooty Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

If Ooty is on your list of possible honeymoon destinations, here’s a list of things you must know before booking a romantic Ooty honeymoon tour package:

  • Ooty is very crowded in the summer, and water supply can be a problem during this time. If you’re looking for an intimate vacation in a less crowded place, it’s best to skip this place in April and May.
  • If you’re driving through Ooty, we suggest moving slowly to avoid hitting wild animals crossing the road.
  • Stay away from private taxi or bus operators as they could insist on booking a particular hotel or resort.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219287593{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Stay Connected

[/vc_column_text][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-phone” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786099141{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

+91 9693339999

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator el_width=”30″][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-envelope” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786244533{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219265284{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Packages

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How Much Does an Ooty Honeymoon Package Cost?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Typical Ooty honeymoon packages usually take around three nights and four days is more than enough to explore significant attractions. At ATW Travels, our packages cost approximately INR 6500 per couple based on average daily expenses.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which Part of Ooty Is Best for A Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

With our Ooty honeymoon packages, you can enjoy the enthralling scenic beauty with your beloved. The itinerary includes majestic hills, dancing waterfalls, gorgeous lakes, and valleys that are sure to mesmerize you.

We’ve listed some famous attractions in and around Ooty for you:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Botanical Garden” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Ooty’s most famous landmarks and a significant tourist attraction that spans 22 hectares of land. The lush green surrounding consists of rare flowers, well-maintained bushes, and blossoming trees. Taking a stroll with your love amidst the exotic flowers is a memory to be cherished till the end of time.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19435″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Rose Garden” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Enjoy the stunning display of the world’s largest and rarest rose collections at the Rose Garden.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Ooty Lake” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Ooty Lake, which covers 65 acres, is one of the most popular attractions for couples visiting Ooty. Enjoy boating while relaxing amidst the spectacular surroundings.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Tea Estate” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

You don’t have to be a tea lover to go on a honeymoon to a hill station surrounded by beautiful green tea farms. But if you are a tea lover, heaven is waiting for you at the tea estate.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Doddabetta Peak” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

It is the highest mountain in Nilgiri Hills and an ideal location for a panoramic view of Ooty.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Is the Best Time to Visit Ooty for A Honeymoon?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Although daytime temperatures are mild and ideal for sightseeing during the winter, it can get very chilly during the night, with temperatures occasionally dropping below 5 degrees Celsius. It’s worth noting that the coldest months are January and February. October to February is ideal for couples looking for affordable Ooty honeymoon packages.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19436″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Book Ooty Honeymoon Packages from ATW Travels?” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels is a fully integrated travel firm that provides complete solutions for businesses and travel enthusiasts worldwide. The company strives to fulfill the clients’ needs while offering the utmost transparency and cost-effective solutions. ATW Travels offers customized Ooty Tour & Ooty Honeymoon packages for couples at an affordable cost.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Waterfalls in Ooty for Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Here’s a list of some of the best waterfalls in Ooty that you should visit if you want to relax and enjoy the visual treat.

  • Catherine Falls is a mesmerizing sight to see.
  • Katy Falls is one of the most visited waterfalls in Ooty.
  • Law’s Falls offers scenic beauty for visitors.
  • OtehKodaaru (Halasana Falls) is a well-known waterfall in India.
  • Pykara Falls is a must-visit that offers an enchanting view of nature.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Places to Visit in Ooty for Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Ooty Lake” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

It is one of the most romantic spots in Ooty for newlywed couples looking to spend some quality time together. You may go boating or rent a cycle for a romantic trip around the lake with your partner.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Botanical Garden” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

The garden consists of rare and luscious trees and plants. In fact, a 20-million-year-old tree trunk that lies in the heart of the Gardens is a major crowd-puller. You may experience a sense of inner peace in the garden.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”19437″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Avalanche Lake” font_container=”tag:h4|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

In Ooty, Avalanche Lake is one of the most adventurous places. You can walk alongside the lake while the cool breeze hugs your body. You may also go fishing and spend the night camping with their sweetheart near the lake.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Best Hotels and Resorts to Stay in Ooty for Honeymoon” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Here are a few hotels and resorts that are consistently top-rated for customer service and hospitality:

  • Ooty’s Savoy Hotel
  • Sullivan Court at Fortune Resort
  • Elk Hill Resorts and Hotels in Sterling, Ooty

At ATW Travels, we offer customized Ooty honeymoon packages that are exclusive and affordable.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

A Vivifying Vacation to Ooty and Wayanad

Ooty, Wayanad

Duration

2 Nights 3 Days

Group Size

Unlimited

Languages

English
[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Spiritual South India Tour

Tirupati, Bangalore, Mysore, Ooty, Madurai, Rameswaram, Kanyakumari

Duration

Group Size

Unlimited

Languages

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”20px” css=”.vc_custom_1646649625275{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

FAQs about Ooty Honeymoon

What Is the Best Time to Honeymoon in Ooty?
The best time to visit Ooty is during the winter. October can be considered the best month to visit Ooty, especially for couples on honeymoon.
How Many Days Are Enough for The Ooty Trip?
Ooty can be easily covered in 2-3 days.
Is Ooty Safe for Honeymoon Couples?
Ooty, reportedly, has fewer violence cases and is, in general, a safe and secure place.
How Can I Reach Ooty?
The nearest domestic airport to Ooty is Coimbatore. The hill station is well connected via road and rail as well.
How Can I Travel in Ooty?
Buses, taxis, hired bikes, and auto-rickshaws are low-cost options available for traveling within Ooty.
What Are the Visa Requirements for International Travelers Visiting Ooty?
Tourists traveling to Ooty must carry a valid tourist visa for three months.
Visa Requirements for International Travellers visiting Ooty?
Tourists traveling to Ooty must carry a tourist visa that is valid for three months.
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”show-mobile contact_bg modifiedcontact”][vc_column][vc_column_text]Get the Guaranteed Best Vacation Deals from ATW Travels[/vc_column_text]
